params.TgtPrompt: Select target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel
params.SpellDescription: Regenerate target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel. (The next time it would be destroyed, instead tap it, remove it from combat, and heal all damage on it.)
